infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to detect when you're at an LIRR station.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs continuous access to your location to remind you to activate your ticket when approaching LIRR stations, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs continuous access to your location to remind you to activate your ticket when approaching LIRR stations.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: This app needs continuous access to your location to remind you to activate your ticket when approaching LIRR stations.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: This app needs continuous access to your location to remind you to activate your ticket when approaching LIRR stations.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: This app needs access to your location to detect when you're at an LIRR station.
